query:
SELECT 
  pv.id,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantType,
  pv.isDefault,
  pv.customerId,
  c1.companyName as directCustomer,
  GROUP_CONCAT(c2.companyName ORDER BY c2.companyName SEPARATOR ', ') as linkedCustomers,
  COUNT(vcl.id) as linkCount
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN companies c1 ON pv.customerId = c1.id
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON pv.id = vcl.variantId
LEFT JOIN companies c2 ON vcl.customerId = c2.id
WHERE pv.productId = 60016
GROUP BY pv.id, pv.variantCode, pv.variantType, pv.isDefault, pv.customerId, c1.companyName
ORDER BY pv.createdAt DESC

LEFT JOIN companies c1 ON pv.customerId = c1.id

ORDER BY pv.createdAt DESC
